title: Support  - App
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app Support > App section displays App Version, Tenant Name, Tenant ID, User ID, App ID, and Last Connected info with a Go button
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. Tap on the menu icon (hamburger menu) or the profile/account icon to access the side navigation.
5. Tap on the 'App' section within the Support screen.
6. Observe the displayed information on the App screen.
expected: The Support > App section displays the following details: App Version, Tenant Name, Tenant ID, User ID, App ID, and Last Connected info. A "Go" button is visible and tappable to proceed to the next action or screen.
